sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set PC = '6040100063' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PC like '40401%' or PC = '4060100156')
update TransX set PC = '6059000000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PC like '6%'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,5) + '01' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%00'
update TransX set GL = '5329901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5349901'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY, BusCat) (Select KeyID,GL, PC, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, '' as TTY, '' as BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, GL, PC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (TTY is NULL or Amt1 = 0)
insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY, BusCat) (Select KeyID,substring(GL,1,3) + '8901' as GL, PC, -Amt1 as Amt1, '' as TTY, '30' as BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY, BusCat) (Select KeyID,substring(Descr,1,3) + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, -Amt1 as Amt1, Field2 asTTY, BusCat from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on substring(GL,1,3) = substring(ID,1,3) and BusCat = Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap5')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY, BusCat) (Select KeyID, '211' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, Amt1, '831' as TTY, BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '401%' and BusCat = '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY,BusCat) (Select KeyID, '211' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, -Amt1 as Amt1, '832' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '401%' and BusCat = '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY,BusCat) (Select KeyID, '202' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, Amt1, '824' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51','52') and BusCat = '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY,BusCat) (Select KeyID, '202' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, -Amt1, '822' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51','52') and BusCat = '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY, BusCat) (Select KeyID, '151' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, Amt1, '831' as TTY, BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '401%' and BusCat = '30')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY,BusCat) (Select KeyID, '151' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, -Amt1 as Amt1, '832' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '401%' and BusCat = '30')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY,BusCat) (Select KeyID, '142' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, Amt1, '824' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51','52') and BusCat = '30')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1, TTY,BusCat) (Select KeyID, '142' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, PC, -Amt1, '822' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51','52') and BusCat = '30')
update TransX set BusCat = '21', TP = '2300' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = ''
update TransX set TP = 'FF001' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '30'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinsType = 0
update TransX set ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Product = 1
update TransX set UWYR = '[year]' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and UWYear = 1
update TransX set AccYr = '[year]' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and AccidentYear = 1
update TransX set ReinLoc = 'USDE' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and InsurerLocation = 1
update TransX set RiskTerr = 'NAUS' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskLocation = 1
update TransX set Broker = '1000000706' from TransX t inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.Broker = 1
update TransX set ReinName = '1000005187' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Cedant = 1
update TransX set TransCode = 'T9999' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.TransCode = 1
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = '40' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 > 0
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0
update TransX set Contract = 'FIRV', Txt = 'FIRV Hud-St true-up', GLdesc = '', Stat = '', CatCode = '', PTF = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
